column1: # Batch trade template (CSV). Drop a copy renamed without ".sample" into
# data/trades/ and the pricer loads every row as a trade.
# Header names match TradeDef fields (Bloomberg vocabulary). Blank cell => default.
# Every convention is PER-LEG; only economic terms are shared.
# AUTO-DERIVED fields -- leave the column blank and it syncs to a sibling:
#   floating_reset_lag_bdays  default 0 (in-arrears OIS has no lookback)
# Leaving these blank reproduces a Bloomberg ticket exactly (Bloomberg does
# not expose them as separate inputs -- it derives them the same way).
# trade_id carries ONLY the trailing unique id; the full
#   AMEX_DAILY_IRS_<val_date>_<id> is reconstructed by the pricer.
# Lines starting with # are ignored. Blank rows are ignored.
